places.name: Le Jules Verne

places.name: Sagrada Familia

reviews.content: Absolutely amazing! The view from the top is breathtaking. A must-visit when in Paris! The architecture is stunning and the history behind it is fascinating.
Great experience but very crowded. Would recommend going early in the morning to avoid long queues. The view is definitely worth it though!
The architecture is stunning! The museum has an incredible collection. Spent the whole day here and still didn't see everything. Will definitely come back!
Food was good but service was slow. The location is unique though, dining in the Eiffel Tower is quite an experience. Pricey but worth it for special occasions.
Perfect location! The hotel is beautiful and the staff is very professional. Highly recommend for a luxury stay. The rooms are spacious and well-appointed.
Amazing crossing! So many people but it's organized chaos. Great place to experience Tokyo's energy. Best visited during rush hour for the full effect.
Beautiful park! Perfect for a walk or picnic. The scenery is stunning and there's so much to see. Great escape from the city hustle.
